name: shy-meta-skills
description: Codex plugin that bundles Shy meta-thinking skills for knowledge topology, theory grounding, unknown-unknown discovery, SOP decomposition, mathematical modeling, quant research, language precision auditing, and James Simons style research prompting.

interface.shortDescription: Meta-thinking and mathematical modeling skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Shy Meta Skills bundles Codex skills for mapping concepts into broader fields, tracing practical problems back to historical theory, discovering unknown unknowns, decomposing rough SOPs into executable paths, turning real-world problems into mathematical models, auditing quant research variables and evidence, improving language precision, and generating James Simons style research prompts.
defaultPrompt: Find the theory ground behind this problem.
Use shy-sop-path-decomposer to turn this rough SOP into executable nodes.
Use math-modeling-decomposer to turn this problem into variables, formulas, calculations, and validation steps.
Use quant-variable-decomposer to audit this trading strategy's variables, samples, validation, execution cost, and kill conditions.
Use shy-language-precision-auditor to audit this expression's missing variables and judgment criteria.
Use james-simons to generate a quant research prompt from this context.
